productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Solid Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black and gold round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, short raglan sleeves with folded stitched cuffs, adidas 3-Stripes in gold on the sleeves, brand name and logo printed in gold on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent below 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, line dry, tumble dry or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations A sporty yet simple addition worth having in your wardrobe, this t-shirt from adidas is a must buy. The soft cotton fabric keeps you comfy all day while the gold coloured patented stripes with brand logo adds great style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
